items.title: AWS X-Ray
items.description: AWS X-Ray for DVA-C02. Distributed tracing, segments and subsegments, service maps, annotations vs metadata, sampling rules, X-Ray daemon, and Java SDK integration with Spring Boot.

items.title: Observability & Monitoring
items.description: Comprehensive guide to observability in distributed systems covering the three pillars (metrics, logs, traces), SLOs, alerting strategies, and Spring Boot Actuator + Micrometer setup.
